description: Phishing templates impersonating social media and professional networking platforms

templates.name: LinkedIn Connection/Profile Alert
suggested_subject_lines: You have 3 new connection requests on LinkedIn
LinkedIn: Your profile appeared in 47 searches this week
Action required: Verify your LinkedIn account

templates.name: LinkedIn – New InMail from Recruiter
suggested_subject_lines: You have a new InMail message
A recruiter sent you a message on LinkedIn
templates.notes: Recruiter-outreach lure taps curiosity and career interest. Broadly effective, low suspicion.

templates.name: Instagram – New Login Alert
suggested_subject_lines: We noticed a new login to your Instagram account
Was this you? New login detected
Security alert: new login to your account
templates.notes: New-login security alert. Relevant where staff use social accounts for marketing/brand work.
